title: Peace Out
description: Personal Modpack focused on building and exploration. The included Apathy mod allows full customization regarding when and which mobs will become aggressive. Suited for both Survival and Creative.
body:
_This is a modpack I made for myself and my friends. It is laid-back and easy to play. If there are any issues, just send me a DM on Tumblr (@memes_n_kitties)._

- The modpack adds many food and decoration mods, such as **Supplementaries, Farmer's Delight (+Addons), Let's Do** series mods and many furniture mods. 

- **Terralith, Terrablender and Yung's Better** series have been added to enhance the world generation and give it a more polished feel. 

- A good amount of optimization mods (**Sodium, Exordium, Dynamic FPS, Entity Culling, FerriteCore** and more) work together to help even laptops from exploding when playing, even allowing lower-end Shaders to be applied without crashing immediately.

- QoL mods such as **EMI, Jade, LambDynamicLights, Carry On, Journey Map, Leaves Be Gone, Falling Tree** and more are must-haves for such a modpack.


The star of the modpack is the **_Apathy_** mod, which allows all players to configure under which conditions mobs turn aggressive in every difficulty. The default option is set to "never", but it can be set back to normal by going into the "config" folder, then the "apathy" folder and then editing the mobs.cfg file in Notepad. Simply set the "nuclearOption" to "false". Further customizing the conditions is up to the individual player.
